programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: Following a double corneal transplant, a concert violinist (Jessica Alba) perceives frightening images of a world that only she can see.

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: An American exchange student (Sarah Michelle Gellar) and her boyfriend (Jason Behr) encounter vengeful spirits that haunt a house in Tokyo.

programme.title: Winchester
programme.desc: To an outsider, Sarah Winchester's 7-story home looks like a monstrous monument to a disturbed woman's madness. But Sarah's actually building a prison -- an asylum for hundreds of vengeful ghosts that have a score to settle with her family.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: A lawman (Timothy Olyphant) and his wife (Radha Mitchell) and two companions fight to make it out of town alive after an unknown toxin turns ordinary citizens into bloodthirsty lunatics.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: A lawman (Timothy Olyphant) and his wife (Radha Mitchell) and two companions fight to make it out of town alive after an unknown toxin turns ordinary citizens into bloodthirsty lunatics.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: Faced with a critical blood shortage, a vampire hematologist (Ethan Hawke) joins forces with humans (Willem Dafoe, Claudia Karvan) to perfect a cure for his problem.

programme.title: Solomon Kane
programme.desc: A man (James Purefoy) must renounce his newly taken vows of peace to rescue a young woman (Rachel Hurd-Wood) from an evil sorcerer (Jason Flemyng).

programme.title: Open Water
programme.desc: Scuba divers (Blanchard Ryan, Daniel Travis) struggle to survive in shark-infested waters after their tour boat accidentally leaves them behind.

programme.title: Dark Tide
programme.desc: A traumatized shark expert (Halle Berry) must battle her own fears to lead a thrill-seeking businessman on a dive into a dangerous section of water known as "Shark Alley."

programme.title: Dark Tide
programme.desc: A traumatized shark expert (Halle Berry) must battle her own fears to lead a thrill-seeking businessman on a dive into a dangerous section of water known as "Shark Alley."

programme.title: All Is Lost
programme.desc: During a solo voyage in the Indian Ocean, a veteran sailor (Robert Redford) must face the possibility of his own death after his vessel, radio and navigation equipment become damaged.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: A vacation in Spain turns nightmarish when a man's (Henry Cavill) family is kidnapped by agents who are hell-bent on recovering a mysterious briefcase.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: A vacation in Spain turns nightmarish when a man's (Henry Cavill) family is kidnapped by agents who are hell-bent on recovering a mysterious briefcase.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A sheriff must take matters into his own hands when a notorious drug lord escapes from FBI custody and comes speeding toward a showdown in the lawman's quiet border town.

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: The world's top protection agent gets a new client: a hitman who came in from the cold. After being on the opposite ends of a bullet for years, they must team up and have only 24 hours to get to The Hague to bring down a murderous dictator.

programme.title: The Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard
programme.desc: Bodyguard Michael Bryce and hitman Darius Kincaid are in over their heads when a madman's sinister plot threatens to leave Europe in total chaos.

programme.title: The Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard
programme.desc: Bodyguard Michael Bryce and hitman Darius Kincaid are in over their heads when a madman's sinister plot threatens to leave Europe in total chaos.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: Retired CIA agents (Bruce Willis, Morgan Freeman, John Malkovich) reassemble for survival after the agency sends assassins to silence them and the secrets they carry.

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA black-ops agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) and his team battle assassins, terrorists and power-hungry government officials as they try to retrieve a lethal device that could change the balance of world power.

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: The world's top protection agent gets a new client: a hitman who came in from the cold. After being on the opposite ends of a bullet for years, they must team up and have only 24 hours to get to The Hague to bring down a murderous dictator.

programme.desc: Bodyguard Michael Bryce and hitman Darius Kincaid are in over their heads when a madman's sinister plot threatens to leave Europe in total chaos.

programme.title: The Unbearable Weight of Massive Talent
programme.desc: Facing financial ruin, actor Nick Cage accepts $1 million to attend a wealthy fan's birthday party. Taking on the role of a lifetime, he soon finds himself channeling his most iconic and beloved characters to save himself and his loved ones.

programme.title: Planet Terror
programme.desc: A one-legged go-go dancer (Rose McGowan) and her ex-lover (Freddy Rodriguez) join forces with other survivors to battle a horde of flesh-eating zombies invading their Texas town.

programme.title: Planet Terror
programme.desc: A one-legged go-go dancer (Rose McGowan) and her ex-lover (Freddy Rodriguez) join forces with other survivors to battle a horde of flesh-eating zombies invading their Texas town.

programme.title: Death Proof
programme.desc: Mike is a professional body double who uses his car to stalk and kill unsuspecting young women in the South.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: Awaking from a coma, an assassin (Uma Thurman) seeks vengeance against her former boss and his ruthless gang (Lucy Liu, Vivica A. Fox).

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
programme.desc: Before confronting her former boss (David Carradine), an assassin (Uma Thurman) goes after the man's younger brother (Michael Madsen) and her one-eyed counterpart.

programme.desc: Before confronting her former boss (David Carradine), an assassin (Uma Thurman) goes after the man's younger brother (Michael Madsen) and her one-eyed counterpart.

programme.title: Jackie Brown
programme.desc: A bail bondsman (Robert Forster) helps a smuggler (Pam Grier) frame her boss (Samuel L. Jackson), an arms dealer who plans to kill her.

programme.title: Reservoir Dogs
programme.desc: Thieves (Harvey Keitel, Tim Roth, Michael Madsen) ponder the identity of the traitor in their midst in the violent aftermath of a failed jewelry heist.

programme.title: Censor
programme.desc: Film censor Enid (Niamh Algar, Wrath of Man) is assigned to review a disturbing film that recalls her childhood memories. She begins to unravel how this eerie work might be tied to the long-ago disappearance of her sister.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective, despondent over the murder of his wife and forced to resign, is brought back to the force when a new serial killer begins taunting him ... who turns out to be a werewolf.

programme.title: Mandibles
programme.desc: Two hapless losers discover a giant fly in the trunk of a stolen car and decide to domesticate it in a bizarre get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: The Evil Next Door
programme.desc: New to her stepmother role, Shirin moves into a duplex with her partner, Fredrik, and his son. The home feels like the right place to start becoming a family. However, when Fredrik leaves, strange things are heard from the other, uninhabited side.

programme.title: Vanishing on 7th Street
programme.desc: Darkness empties Detroit, except for a few people (Hayden Christensen, Thandie Newton) who band together to battle it with light.

programme.title: The East

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Howie Mandel's hit game show is back with new twists and turns! A larger-than-life Brooklyn native breaks out some wild dance moves...hustling his way toward the $1 million he hopes will fund his daughter's wedding.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A high-spirited marketing executive seeks to win $1 million in order to return home to her family farm in Ohio; as she faces the Banker's cruellest test, it turns out her father is the game show's biggest fan and her ultimate weapon.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Rugged family man David Leeman brings a larger-than-life enthusiasm to his face-off with the Banker, as he strives to finally give his wife a dream wedding.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.desc: Restaurateur George Stathoulis and his big Greek family take over the show in a loud, colourful and suspense-filled game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Howie Mandel can't keep up with fitness instructor Missy Silverman, who whistles and performs celebratory cartwheels; Missy dreams of taking her childhood friends on a dream cruise, if she can find it, before the offers end.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Energetic cheerleader `Tex' Iniguez hopes to cheer her way to a million dollars, while bowling champion Kyera Chandler hopes to strike it rich and start her own business.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Roll Cage Transforms Miata From Daily Driver To Race Car - Part 2
programme.desc: The Carcass guys start tearing into the Mazda Miata Racecar, making room for a new race seat and building a roll cage for safety.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Running Our '69 Camaro Through the Wringer
programme.desc: With the SeaFoam Camaro finished up, it is time to see what all those upgrades have done for our Restomod Giveaway. Then we help a viewer with some repairs on their vehicle on another Driveway Rescue

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: Power upgrades are great especially if you can bolt-on big performance in a day. Mike and Pat grab some wrenches to install a ProCharger supercharger on a 2019 Challenger ProCharger.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: Engine Power embarks on a new project for SCCA's inaugural SPEC Mustang class. We'll take a 2008 Mustang GT and begin getting it ready for this entry level, but competitive class.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Repairing An Abandoned Chevy Silverado - Part 1
programme.desc: The Carcass crew gives you some tips on how to repair rusty trouble spots and remove dents on your project. Then we'll walk you through getting it ready for primer.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Our Sleeper Granada Gets Four Times The Horsepower!
programme.desc: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver...until you step on the throttle! With each aftermarket upgrade, our 1977 Ford takes one step closer to that goal.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: We build a wicked dirt track car, starting with a hand-built chassis and hi-tech suspension!

programme.title: Truck Tech
programme.desc: Project Lo 'n Slo is what we called our '65 Fleetside Chevy C10. With a beautiful patina, we leave the body to mother nature, but ditch the 350 small block for a unique 292 straight-six with a turbo.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.desc: Project Hard Charger gets the front end buttoned up and we help a viewer restore his cranky Camaro.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.desc: It's bedtime! Today, Eric and Joel are laying down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350-Project Nightshift. We'll address the fuel system and core support, and slap on an all-new exhaust, getting us one step closer to the finish line.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.desc: It's bedtime! Today, Eric and Joel are laying down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350-Project Nightshift. We'll address the fuel system and core support, and slap on an all-new exhaust, getting us one step closer to the finish line.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Drifting Trailblazer SS Is Ready for the Track After Suspension Upgrades
programme.desc: The Trailblazer SS goes from super sport to drifting sport...suspension upgrades and a power adder cap off the project sending it to the track!

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Turn Back Time and Prep for the Future
programme.desc: Recap and Forecast on the projects we have in the shop. Install new drivetrain and chassis on Buick Project Street Regal.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: Swapping a Ford 300 In A 1964 F350 Flatbed Shop Truck
programme.desc: We're turning our 1964 Ford Flatbed into a shop truck! With the help of the team in Engine Power, the guys make an engine swap that includes a turbo! Plus we're off to the junkyard in search of a transmission.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Increasing the Fun Factor of a C5 Z06
programme.desc: Is the C5 Corvette Z06 the ultimate bang for your buck track and street car, or is there room for improvement?

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: As we say in Engine Power, "Dyno days are the BEST days!" and these are some of our favorite dyno runs.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Will This Junkyard 1977 C-30 Square Body Tow Truck Start?
programme.desc: The Carcass Duo find a left for dead tow truck that they want to give a new life through fabrication and a little imagination.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Fabricating Exhaust Tips for our '85 Buick Regal
programme.desc: We take Hard Charger to the Mopar Nationals in Ohio to give it a final shakedown, then we try to decide our next project vehicle.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Swapping In A Performance Clutch On The Spec Miata Racecar - Part 3
programme.desc: The crew starts tearing into the drivetrain and suspension of their Spec Mazda Miata racecar to help it perform better on the track.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Modern 410ci Stroker Windsor with Custom EFI & Coil-Near-Plug Conversion - Part 2
programme.desc: We're expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford, after it receives an aggressive intake manifold, a custom coil-on-plug conversion, and a powerful EFI system!

programme.title: Truck Tech
programme.desc: Performance upgrades on our 6.7L Ram continue with install of larger intercooler, & gauges. Plus how to smoke taillights for a cool accent.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Single Vs. Dual Plane Manifold: Which Will Make More Power For Our Ford 302
programme.desc: Previously, our forgotten Ford powerplant pumped out stout numbers in the dyno cell. Our goal this time: even more power!

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: 1977 F-150 Gets Some Much Needed Upgrades
programme.desc: We open the mailbox and answer some long-awaited viewer questions. We'll also hit the road to rescue a 1977 Ford F150 in need of repair.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: 1977 F-150 Gets Some Much Needed Upgrades
programme.desc: We open the mailbox and answer some long-awaited viewer questions. We'll also hit the road to rescue a 1977 Ford F150 in need of repair.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: Can We Make This Stock '91 Suburban Unbreakable?

programme.title: Truck Tech
programme.desc: The dyno don't lie! Big power adders will complement our lifted Silverado.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Tackling The Worn Out Road Runner Interior - Part 4
programme.desc: Tommy and Joel give the '69 Road Runner's interior a much-needed makeover. We'll restore the dash and give the seats and headliner some much needed attention.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Wider is Better for our Autocross Camaro: New Suspension and Shoes
programme.desc: Part 2 of the Autocross Camaro Build. The 25th Anniversary Camaro gets a suspension overhaul, and a fender package that gives it a track worthy look.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Can a Stock Cast SBC Crank live at 7000 RPM and 570+ HP?
programme.desc: E85 fuel promises high-octane performance for almost any engine. We put it to the test in our revamped 360ci "Compression Obsession" Small Block Chevy.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Phasing Twin Big Blocks For More Power
programme.desc: We seek more power from our twin-engine dyno setup, by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the 496 Big Block Chevy engines. Plus we head to Texas to check out SAM Tech's engine program!

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
programme.desc: Today we finish the final assembly of our 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco with the installation of the interior.

programme.title: Truck Tech
programme.desc: The '65 C10's patina meets a pearl that you just have to see! Plus it gets a locking differential conversion.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Boosting A Crown Vic Police Interceptor 160 Horsepower

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.desc: Today we introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project. We'll talk with an expert about the history of the Mini Truck Slam world. Audio systems are a huge component of these projects, so we explain what we will be using.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Converting The '70 RestoMod Mustang Suspension From Leaf Spring To Coilover
programme.desc: The Detroit Muscle team dives into the EBC Mustang Sweepstakes car, but things may have to get worse before they can get better. The first step is to build a solid foundation for this Resto Mod.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Burnt Junkyard 6.4L Gen III HEMI Rises From The Ashes
programme.desc: A burned-up 6.4L Gen III HEMI is revived with some old school hot rod parts.

programme.title: XOR - Xtreme Off-Road
programme.desc: Our Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Rubicon gets a stronger axle, and a custom built bumper. Plus, how you can build your own rack for trail tools.

programme.title: XOR - Xtreme Off-Road
programme.desc: Our Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Rubicon gets a stronger axle, and a custom built bumper. Plus, how you can build your own rack for trail tools.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: Putting TrackHawk Power Into A 1986 Jeep Wagoneer
programme.desc: The guys visit DBR Performance and their first chance ever to drive a Jeep TrackHawk, which inspires a plan of their own...to turn an old Wagoneer into a screaming street monster.

programme.title: Carcass
programme.desc: The Carcass guys pick up the power plant for their grassroots racer and start assembling the heart of the beast with power producing components.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Custom Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
programme.desc: With a nod to the Grand National we're giving our Buick Regal more Go Go. Fabricating a race inspired fuel system gets us one step closer to our '85 Buick Regal launch.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Minor Upgrades Create Crazy Power on a Junkyard 5.3L Vortec
programme.desc: We're starting with a high-mileage 5.3L Vortec that we got on the cheap. Our goal: make as much horsepower as we can, spending the least money possible.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: Our 5.3L street machine powerplant gets updated with sequential EFI and more.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.desc: Tommy and Peyton get cracking on a true piece of 90s muscle, their 1990 Mustang. This Fast Lane Fox Body Stang takes its first ride, before a total makeover that'll turn it from Half-Bred Pony to Thoroughbred Stallion.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.desc: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO. They'll have to tear down and look inside the skeleton of this old muscle car before they fix it up.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: EBC Mustang: The Full Supercharged Coyote Build
programme.desc: The Detroit Muscle crew transforms a 1970 Fastback Mustang into a track ready driver that will handle like it's on rails. Check it out from start to finish.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: 632 ci Big Block Chevy Build for Project Wild & Willys
programme.desc: A high-compression 632 ci Big Block Chevy provides massive power for XOR's Willys Wagon.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Building a Small Block Ford Race Engine
programme.desc: Endurance is the name of the game in building a fresh Small Block Ford race engine.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.desc: Tommy and Marc finish up the last few details on our '69 SeaFoam Camaro. Plus a mechanics fantasy land we head to California for the Matco Tools Expo to see what new products they have coming out.

programme.title: HorsePower
programme.sub-title: 351 Small Block Dyno Shootout: Windsor vs Cleveland

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: Faux Guy Square Body Gets Custom 3" Stainless Exhaust
programme.desc: We start reassembling our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body. We'll add steering, brakes, exhaust, and glass. Plus restoration components that will make our square body look young again!

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: With over 600 horses the Gen II is ready to pound the pavement! From the street, to the track, to the strip, this split bumper is a beast. We also take you inside the PRI Show to checkout the latest in race engine technology.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: With over 600 horses the Gen II is ready to pound the pavement! From the street, to the track, to the strip, this split bumper is a beast. We also take you inside the PRI Show to checkout the latest in race engine technology.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: '69 Road Runner Gets An Enhanced Patina Paint Upgrade Part 3
programme.desc: The '69 Road Runner gets an exterior upgrade. We'll show you some unorthodox methods for enhancing a patina paint look.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: As part of the Motorsports Team, students at UNOH build high-performance Stock and Modified dirt race cars. On Friday nights, they push them to their limits at Limaland Motorsports Park!

programme.title: Carcass
programme.sub-title: Junkyard Postal Jeep Delivers With 1 Ton Axles and 4WD
programme.desc: A '78 Postal Jeep gets a second chance as we start turning it into an all around offroad rig starting with a set of 1 ton axles.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.sub-title: Twin Big Blocks Dyno'd Together Part 1
programme.desc: We do something that has never been done before: build two identical 496 Big Block Chevy engines to run on the dyno...at the SAME TIME!!

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Tearing Down A 1971 Chevy Caprice - Fat Stack Part 1
programme.desc: Tommy and Joel kick off a new project, a 1971 Chevy Caprice. They search through a big-body boneyard to find the inspiration to help separate this car from stereotypical b-body builds.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
programme.desc: We lay out our plan to rebuild our 1985 Chevy K-10. We start by tearing it down and building it back up with new sheet metal repair. What we have in mind for this truck will make you do a double-take!

programme.title: XOR - Xtreme Off-Road
programme.sub-title: How Does a Stock Jeep JL Rubicon Perform?
programme.desc: Our Wrangler Unlimited Rubicon Hits the trails. We find out what the JL needs to survive on the 2019 XOR Adventure.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.desc: With no time to kill, Eric and Joel install the remaining components to get Clint Black's old 1960 Ford F-100 back on the road again.

programme.title: Engine Power
programme.desc: We dust off our Test Sled from the pits of darkness and give it a new life. It gets a new heartbeat with a 410ci stack-injected LS engine, backed by a Tremec TKX transmission, to bring the Test Sled back to track ready status

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.sub-title: Fabricating a Buick Regal Custom Bumper
programme.desc: We add some GNX body panels to our '85 Buick Regal. We clean up and update a set of old Camaro/Nova wheels with fresh paint and trim pieces.

programme.title: Detroit Muscle
programme.desc: Project Hard Charger gets the front end buttoned up and we help a viewer restore his cranky Camaro.

programme.title: Music City Trucks
programme.sub-title: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
programme.desc: Our '74 Bronco build is getting a suspension overhaul plus new axles, brakes, wheels and tires! And John Kramen from Mecum Auctions stops by to check on the progress.

programme.desc: Retirees Helen and Richard want to turn an abandoned barn into a luxury home for their golden years; an unforeseen foundation issue trashes their budget and their ambitious five-month timeline.

programme.title: Derelict Rescue
programme.desc: Factory worker Rob converts an abandoned water tower into luxury digs; Rob defies the warnings of family, battles isolation and confronts unyielding concrete walls before an accident nearly derails the project.

programme.desc: Mark meets Adam in Yorkshire, who wants to transform the bathroom in his rundown country cottage, featuring a vaulted ceiling, wood panelling, stone flooring and a vintage bath; in Walthamstow, Emma and Jono want a Japanese-inspired kitchen.

programme.title: Dream Kitchens & Bathrooms

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express n°53 will take us from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing through some of the country's most mythical sites, such as the Meteors, those vertiginous rocky peaks in the Thessaly plain; the famous ruins of Delphi.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Now crossed by a high-speed line and modernized intercity tracks, Andalusia will reveal itself, along its stations... leading us to meet wine growers, horse breeders, or flamenco dancers, and see sumptuous landscapes and mythical cities.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In the heart of the Eastern Pyrenees, le Petit Train Jaune will wind its way through the Catalan mountainside, crossing, among other things, the Cerdan plateau; the Gisclard bridge, and the incredible network of caves of the Grandes Canalettes.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express n°53 will take us from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing through some of the country's most mythical sites, such as the Meteors, those vertiginous rocky peaks in the Thessaly plain; the famous ruins of Delphi.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Now crossed by a high-speed line and modernized intercity tracks, Andalusia will reveal itself, along its stations... leading us to meet wine growers, horse breeders, or flamenco dancers, and see sumptuous landscapes and mythical cities.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: L'île de Beauté, literally The Island of beauty as French people call Corsica, has never been better named than when considering its incredible railway network. From the turquoise waters of the Mediterranean to the top of the steepest mountains.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: TV Chef Andi Oliver takes Fred to Marrakech to enjoy lamb and couscous at legendary restaurant, chicken tagine for under £10, and breakfast on a roof terrace.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Food writer Rachel Khoo takes Fred to Vienna to experience exquisite coffee and cake, comforting dumplings, and mangalitza pork schnitzel.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is heading to Bristol for a winter treat in the company of Michel Roux Junior. Michel can't wait to show Fred his favourites, from the perfect French bistro to a festive countryside escape and Jamaican jerk turkey.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Nadiya Hussain shows Fred the culinary sights of Yorkshire including Bettys' iconic tea and cakes, a rural Wensleydale cheese farm and shop, and a small restaurant which serves home made samosas, Nadiya's favourite spicy Indian snack.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chris Bavin takes Fred to the New Forest, where fresh local produce is king. Featuring wood-fired cooking, pork pies and a country pub serving the perfect Ploughman's.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Master Pasta Maker of Puglia, Italy
programme.desc: TV and radio host Dermot O'Leary takes Fred Sirieix to Puglia in Italy's deep South to his favourite restaurants showcasing simple but sublime cucina povera or poor man's cooking.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Baking Artisinal Pastries in Mallorca, Spain
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Searching for the Best Pizza in Rome, Italy
programme.desc: Chef Giorgio Locatelli takes Fred to Rome in search of the city's most exciting eats. Sublime pasta, fluffy gnocchi and the world's best pizza all delicious but affordable.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Floating Restaurant of Devon, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Fred travels to South Devon with chef and restauranteur Angela Hartnett. From Angela's all-time favourite restaurant in Dartmouth to an incredible floating cafe on the River Exe.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Perfecting Puff Pastry in Burgundy, France
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Michael Caines takes Fred to Burgundy to amazing places to eat serving the finest French country cooking and exquisite patisserie.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Exploring Castles and Cozy Inns in South Wales, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Restaurateur Thomasina Miers takes Fred to South Wales to explore some wild places to eat from an ancient inn to a beachside restaurant and wood fired cooking.

programme.title: Bear Grylls' Biggest Adventures in Britain

COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a man about to confront his wife for her accusations about his sexuality, search a baton-wielding cyclist, and check the prints of a man with no identification.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mother with an arrest warrant is apprehended after trying to evade police, a repeat traffic offender commits multiple offenses, and cops respond to a domestic abuse case.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies respond to an armed carjacking, an altercation leads to a woman's arrest, and officers face a combative man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to escape on foot after driving without a license, two friends hide meth in plain sight, and an intoxicated man is caught peering into a restaurant after hours.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control of the vehicle and runs into a stop sign. With the aid of stop sticks, a driver’s car becomes disabled. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a drug house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man who threatened his neighbors redirects his anger toward the deputies, and a driver in crisis puts the lives of others on the line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young girl may be the victim of a sexual assault. An officer spots a speeding motorcycle and attempts a routine stop. Officers serve a violation of domestic violence warrant on an inebriated guest at a local hotel.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. A man is arrested for burglarizing a casino, he initially denies the charges but surveillance footage corroborates. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in tire slashing. Suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he's caught burglarizing property in the area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several units are in pursuit of a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car after he crashed into a tree. Officers intervene in domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man's pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex. A man explains how his ex-girlfriend climbed into his window.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue a mentally unwell man, a driver is arrested for crystal meth possession after his passengers incriminate him, and an arrested suspect apologizes to his son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in New Jersey is arrested for possession. A couple is pulled over while driving around a known drug zone looking to score and the boyfriend is arrested for an outstanding warrant. A routine traffic stop turns into a fruitful drug bust.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: C & O: North America's most diverse car show: Featuring custom Bugs, John Kaase fire breathing '56 Fords, and Chevy Silverados touching 1000HP

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Amelia Island's own Caffeine & Octane car show,: Featuring $2,000 Wrek Racing Truck, David Patterson's favorite C&O cars, a plastic Citroen Mehari, and much more.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: The Concours d'Elegance from Amelia Island: Featuring bomb-proof Conquest Knight XV, '69 Camaro Hagerty Fixer-Upper, and car-enthusiast John Oates.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: State-of-the-art engineering and passion projects take center stage on this edition of Caffeine & Octane. The revolutionary Delta Wing Racer turns on hot lap after hot lap at Road Atlanta, and driver Katherine Legge offers insight on how “less is more” when it comes to power to weight ratios; the dark world of a graffiti artist paints a picture of a car called Vengeance while the hosts share the eclectic hybrids of machines that make it to Caffeine and Octane with Vengance’s creator Totem.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: The word is out that Caffeine & Octane is the ultimate scene and the place to be seen. Even after 12 hours of racing at the Petit Le Mans endurance race, Henry Ford III, the great grandson of Henry Ford the industrial magnate and current member of Ford’s Board of Directors, showed up to take in the sights, address the crowds, and sign a one of a kind Ford Shelby GT350R. The GT350R will hit the road with Operation Hope to encourage young people to study math and science through motorsports; Covert car counterfeiter, Chuck Beck looks for Ford’s approval on his own version of a muscled up Festiva. YouTuber ‘That Dude in Blue’ David Patterson joins Skip and Bryan to get a special look at the motor-based philanthropic outreach and amazing cars that come with it done by John Hope Bryant, friend of Caffeine and Octane.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Rickey and Bryan race outside of their comfort zones, each competing to find the raddest car collection. Rickey hangs out with classic racer, Ron Green, who shows him the ropes in the ultra light '83 Ralt RT5. Bryan visits a collection of 120 racing motorcycle owned by mechanic and racer Mike McConville. Mike takes Bryan motorcross racing in his backyard after showing off his high horsepowered car collection. Caffeine and Octane alongside Ron Green visit Atlanta's first Concours d'elegance to look at classic cars that have been perfectly maintained for decades.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Wayne Phears’ Jaguar E-Type was nothing more than a diamond in the rough before the mineral rights attorney took on the basket case. Caffeine & Octane brings viewers the story of how Phears’, through relentless research and determination, restored and reunited the #10 Jag that Enzo Ferrari called “the most beautiful car ever made”; Atlanta Wraps shows how wrapping Corvettes and Lamborghinis can color a car fast. Caffeine and Exotics is featured again to show off the coolest wraps Atlanta can supply.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Twenty-five years of hand building record-setting race cars is no easy task. But don’t tell that to Don Panoz who takes on Porsches and Ferraris with his laid back personality and a full-production facility that makes improvised versions of Americas V-8’s; Caffeine & Octane gets an exclusive look at an elusive man’s life long pursuit of everything Chevrolet.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane goes old school with Psycho Deville singer and pin striper Walt Richards. Richards has less than a week to hand paint his signature flames on a way cool ’50 Mercury. An introduction to Retrofit Lighting’s trickle down technology - from cars to motorcycles - that will revolutionize how bikes will see and be seen.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane is known for having something for everyone. That reputation is tested when over 100 VW’s, on the lunatic fringe of automotive, rattled into an event. The annual VW Invasion has swarmed C&O, bringing with it Bugs, Beetles, Buses and more by a very dedicated VW fan base.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Rapper, radio, and ATL TV personality Darian “Big Tigger” Morgan invites Caffeine & Octane into his home. Cameras look past his collection of 500 Michael Jordan shoes to focus their lenses on a one-off motorcycle the 6–time NBA Champion gave to Tigger as a gift; A second to none, muscle car collection by one of the founders of Monster Energy gets toured by one of our hosts.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman refuses to wear jail-issued clothing. A man tells his tearful tale to officers, and a chatty inebriated woman is placed in isolation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman who was nabbed for jaywalking claims the police were out of line for arresting her. A woman is brought in on domestic-violence charges, and a drug peddler claims he's selling to support his addiction to poker.

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL officers place a hostile former Marine in isolation. In Portland, OR officers take a man into custody for joyriding in a stolen car. programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Guards uncover grooming aids stashed in an unlikely spot while combing through a woman's things. An incarcerated tourist threatens to bring in Johnny Cochran for his defense, and a drunk driver awakens to find X-rated artwork drawn on his body.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: We follow the men and women of LVMPD as they do their best to tame the New Year's Eve festivities up and down the Las Vegas Strip.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers have difficulty booking an incomprehensible man. A commotion at a church ends in arrest. A man wearing a tuxedo is detained after mocking officers for wearing “pig suits.”

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus only daughter wants to experience the real world before she must marry the son of Jack Frost and take over the family business. Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her famous father a secret.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: When a woman learns of her high school reunion a week before Christmas, she's ecstatic to finally have her chance to win the one "that got away" back.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: The Christmas Kid
programme.desc: A take on Home Alone British style where the main character is all grown up now.

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: Christmas Break-In
programme.desc: Christmas Break-In is the story of Izzy, a spunky nine year-old who gets left at school on the last day before Christmas break.

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Hillary Burns (Somerville) is always struggling in life and love while constantly feeling the pressure to marry from her demanding mother, Meredith (Long).

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: Christmas in The Heartland
programme.desc: Kara and Jessie strike up an unlikely friendship when seated next to each other on a plane headed to the heartland. With both girls visiting family they've never met, they devise a plan to switch places for Christmas.

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless For Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: Dark World
programme.desc: A retired Los Angeles detective (Michael Paré) investigates a series of missing-person cases with his ex-partner.

programme.title: Color Out of Space
programme.desc: After a meteorite lands in the front yard of their farm, Nathan Gardner and his family find themselves battling a mutant extraterrestrial organism that infects their minds and bodies, transforming their quiet rural life into a technicolor nightmare.

programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: Murderous consequences unravel in the dead of night as the lives of two assassins, a teacher, a janitor and a waitress intertwine at the hands of a mysterious criminal mastermind who's out for revenge.

programme.title: And Now the Screaming Starts
programme.desc: An English doctor (Peter Cushing) helps a lord and his bride (Stephanie Beacham) cope with a severed hand and a curse.

programme.title: Burying the Ex
programme.desc: A horror fan's (Anton Yelchin) dead girlfriend (Ashley Greene) comes back as a zombie and wants to continue their relationship forever.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: Psychics (Paul Le Mat, Irene Miracle, Matt Roe) at a bay hotel meet the puppets Pin Head, Leech Woman, Tunneler, Blade and Jester.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: A neurotic ventriloquist's belief that his stage dummy controls his actions leads him to murder, madness and more.

programme.title: Hellraiser
programme.desc: A puzzle box summons the Cenobites, destroying a family (Andrew Robinson, Clare Higgins, Ashley Laurence).

programme.title: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: Hollywood screenwriter Don Malek (Stephen Geoffreys) holes up in a seedy hotel and scripts a diabolical plan for revenge using his own hands.

programme.title: Burying the Ex
programme.desc: A horror fan's (Anton Yelchin) dead girlfriend (Ashley Greene) comes back as a zombie and wants to continue their relationship forever.

programme.title: Return to Horror High
programme.desc: A film crew is stalked by a psychotic killer while shooting at a school infamous for a rash of murders five years before.

programme.title: The Evil in Us
programme.desc: A woman fights for her life on a remote island when a mysterious drug turns her fiance and four friends into bloodthirsty cannibals.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: A professor investigates three chilling and inexplicable cases related to an abandoned asylum, a car accident and the spirit of an unborn child. Even scarier -- each of the macabre tales seems to have a sinister connection to his own life.

programme.desc: Mearth hates his first day of school on planet Ork so much that Mork and Mindy accompany him back to Ork Prep, where Mork's ancient teacher - who looks like a child - is still sternly in charge.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy, already worried about losing her job at the television station, foresees disaster when Mork and Mearth accidentally transfer minds, forcing her to take Mearth in Mork’s body to meet the new boss.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, and Edna travel to New York to visit Frank's mother and attend a street festival; they are joined there by Lenny and Squiggy (who hitchhiked).

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, Edna, Lenny, and Squiggy continue their visit to New York, and Frank wants to win a trip to Italy for his mother by winning the Greased Pole competition.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: TV game show "Be Silly for Dollars" comes to Milwaukee. Len, Squig, and the girls are chosen as contestants. The boys are happy, winning a salami, but the girls perform zany stunts to win the grand prize from "The World of Luxury".

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne's new man Jake is exciting, but that excitement turns to danger when he forces her to help rob a store. Shaken up, she begs Shirley to help rid her of him. Jake won't have it, but can they get him to surrender to the police?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley takes a night school Medical Assistance class. Laverne joins her too. Professor Wilner makes learning tough for Laverne so she walks out, as he says she's unteachable. Will Shirley help Laverne bone up and pass the class?

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork and unsuspecting Mindy hatch a comedy plot that's bigger than both of them when an egg emerges from Mork's navel that grows and grows until it bursts open and out pops their full-grown, middle-aged-looking son.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2010 death of Stephanie Roller, a Colorado mother of three who allegedly went for a walk during a blizzard and was later found dead in a nearby river.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This report offers fresh insight into the brutal murder of Sheila Bellush, a Sarasota, Florida mother of quadruplets who was killed in front of her children.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on problems which arise when children under the age of 17 receive unwanted sexual letters on the Internet, focusing on Lindsay, a 14-year-old suburban Florida girl who began receiving explicit love letters from a stranger in Greece.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In the relationship between an Oscar-winner's son and his fashion designer girlfriend, one is found dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Whether a true crime television show influenced the investigation of an alleged rape and murder case in Atlanta.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Bill Flint spent his life cheating death -- not once, not twice, but three times. His friends say this is a story of how a lot of bad things happened to a really good person.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The story of sweethearts Sabrina Gonsalves and John Riggins who were brutally murdered in Davis, California, in 1980. Initially, police suspected Gerald Gallego, but he was in jail at the time of the murders.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the case that has inspired the 2015 theatrical film “True Story”, which recounts how Christian Longo posed as discredited New York Times journalist Michael Finkel, while on the run in Mexico -- after murdering his wife and children in Oregon.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the October 2004 murder of Dr. Brian Stidham, a pediatric eye surgeon in Tucson, Arizona, and the subsequent investigation which led to the trial and conviction of his colleague Dr. Bradley Schwartz.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2009 disappearance of Dawn Viens, and why her husband, California chef David Viens, jumped off a cliff when he became a suspect in her disappearance.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Authorities first suspect the husband in the savage murder of a Florida doctor, but when he has an alibi, they follow a tip on a 1,100 mile trip that takes the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a beloved Florida doctor reveals his dark, secret past.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In September 2006, Kathy Wangler, wife of anesthesiologist Dr. Mark Wangler, died from carbon monoxide poisoning in their home. Their 30-year marriage had been falling apart; In 2009, investigators concluded that Dr. Wangler had murdered his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kim and Beth Jones have been trying to prove that their father, Jerry Jones, Jr. is innocent of the 1988 murder of their mother, Lee. Jones was found guilty, but in 1999, the court ordered him released due to an ineffective lawyer.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Two women fight to keep the man convicted of killing their mother over 20 years earlier in prison, though he maintains his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the 1998 murder, of 12-year-old Stephanie Crowe. The girl's 14-year-old brother Michael, and his two friends confessed to the killing. Their attorney claims that the confessions were false and the result of police coercion.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the October 2004 murders of former beauty queen Leslie Mazzara and her roommate, Adriane Insogna, in the bedrooms of their Napa, California home. A third roommate, Lauren Mianza, sleeping downstairs, was not harmed and was the only witness

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: An a-list fashion writer leaves her fast-track career and becomes a single mom, but she also becomes the only murder victim in 30 years in her serene Cape Cod town

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The arrival of Diane Chambers in Seattle puts Frasier on an emotional roller coaster ride.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Maris gets in trouble with the law, Niles seeks the help of a shady character who will solve the problem in return for a "favor.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: In honor of Leap Year, Frasier urges his friends and family members to try something daring, but their own "leaps" don't turn out as expected.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Much to his chagrin, Frasier becomes a local hero after he physically assaults a rude customer at Cafe Nervosa.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier challenges his father to a game of chess, but when Martin wins, Frasier becomes obsessed with beating him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles square off in a court battle over the competency of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier sets his sights on a female police officer who actually has a crush on his father.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The new station owner asks Frasier to help his fiancée stop smoking, but Frasier panics when he realizes his "patient" is his hard-driving agent.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz mistakenly thinks Frasier is in love with her when he tries to break up her new relationship.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Frasier learns that one member of a focus group doesn't like his show, he stops at nothing to find out the reason.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Listening to a tape of his very first radio show sends Frasier on a somewhat uncomfortable trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane household is turned upside down when Daphne's old flame comes to town.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Roz sets Frasier up on a blind date, Bulldog winds up falling for her instead.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Frasier is awakened night after night by a recurring dream, he becomes obsessed with analyzing the psychological meaning behind it.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Martin befriends a reclusive writer both Frasier and Niles admire, they become obsessed with reading the author's first manuscript in decades.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: While filling in for Frasier, Niles gains fame after counseling a local basketball star who's in a slump.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Daphne gets dumped by her boyfriend, Niles decides it's time to declare his love for her.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith join forces so that their son can gain admission to the most prestigious private school in Boston.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin buys Frasier an expensive painting -- but Frasier doesn't have the heart to tell his father that he hates it.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles disapprove of Martin's relationship with his brassy new girlfriend.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier finds himself in a precarious position when he tries to help the troubled marriage of a former high school acquaintance.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Frasier becomes fed up with the rules and regulations governing his condominium complex, he decides to run for condo board president.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Eddie shows signs of depression, a pet therapist thinks Martin's dog is simply reacting to the dysfunctional Crane family!

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When the Crane brothers go away for the weekend with two attractive women, Niles discovers he hasn't quite cut his emotional ties to Maris.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles moves into a prestigious building and tries to impress his snobby neighbors with an elegant dinner party.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: While volunteering at a retirement home, Roz becomes convinced that she's "the angel of death" after her first two patients die on her.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Rather than show his son that his dad's not perfect, Frasier agrees to join the station's softball team -- even though he has no idea how to play the game.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When an on-air hosting spot opens up at the station, Roz decides to go for it -- but Frasier's agent has other ideas.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's attempts to produce a live, 1940s-style radio drama for the station's fiftieth anniversary produce chaos instead.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: While Frasier tries to juggle three dates in three days, Martin and his girlfriend face the prospect of breaking up.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier tries to get Martin and Sherry to reconcile -- to the detriment of his own love life.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are caught in the middle when Martin's girlfriend and Daphne can't stop bickering.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier tries to console Niles after Maris serves him with divorce papers.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Niles asks Frasier whether he and Maris belong together, Frasier goes out of his way to give his brother an honest, thoughtful response.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier comes down with a case of the "bachelor blues" when he realizes that every single person he knows is dating someone -- except him.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: The wait is over, America -- Ron Burgundy is back! After losing his job, Ron reassembles the news team and squares off against a new rival in the comedy that critics are calling one of the funniest movies of the year!

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rescued
programme.desc: Come along on an amazing adventure with some remarkable animals, like endangered cheetahs, an orphaned wombat, and even a grey whale, that are getting a second chance.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Find out why all of the animals on today’s countdown are showing off their pearly whites. From the hippos' mega-chompers to snakes with fangs that inject toxic venom, and piranhas, crocs, African elephants and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack takes off on a very special egg hunt, looking for creatures big and small that hatch from eggs! Crocodiles, bald eagles, sea turtles, ostriches, penguins, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Most baby animals are adorable, but only a select few get to be called “cubs.” Come along with Jungle Jack as he counts down some cute and cuddly cubs, like lions, cheetahs, bears and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the world's largest crocodile farm and assists in the capture of a 14-foot reptilian destined for a Thailand education center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: See Jack dive with a bull shark, encounter a highly venomous sea snake and get in a sticky situation with a sea creature. Then Jack takes part in some local traditions and learns of Fiji's ominous past.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is crisscrossing the planet to meet up with Gorillas, Chimpanzees and Orangutans. Come along for a journey with our closest living relatives, the Great Apes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet impressive and iconic species, each representing their home continent, like Asian King Cobras, Australian Kangaroos, African Lions, Antarctica’s Penguins, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack becomes enthralled with the country's beautiful butterflies, including the Blue Morpho, the “Queen of the Rainforest.”

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: What could be better than getting up-close animal encounters with wildlife from Africa, Asia, and North America? Doing it all in one place, right here in the ole' US of A!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the loveable Koala to the feisty Tasmanian Devil, this adventure to the other side of the world uncovers some of the most unique animals on the planet. Plus Jack and his family get a special tour of the Australia Zoo from the Irwin family.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet creatures that couple up for keeps, like Magellanic penguins, West Africa’s Red River hogs, Chilean flamingos, golden lion tamarins and more. Love is in the air on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Colossal Creatures
programme.desc: Jack travels the world meeting six colossal creatures, like the African elephant, Galapagos tortoise, ostrich, whale shark, mandrill and anaconda!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he witnesses a special delivery first-hand and meets some other precious animal babies, like camels, manatees, rhino and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Tampa, more than 200 unwanted, abused animals, most of them exotic cats, have it made for the rest of their lives at the sanctuary on Easy Street. Jack finds out from the founder of Wildlife on Easy Street that caring for 17 species of cats.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets the lucky creatures that are cared for by some of the most interesting veterinarians from across the world. Koalas, Cheetahs, Gorillas, Dogs, Eland, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is back at the barnyard with six of his favorite farm animal friends, like pot-bellied pigs, horses, cows, and even camels!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Whales & Dolphins
programme.desc: This Wild Countdown swims, leaps and breaches into the wonderful world of dolphins and whales. From inspirational stories to unbelievable adaptations, check out Jack’s most exciting marine mammal adventures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tree Huggers
programme.desc: Today’s creatures seem to defy gravity with their ease in the trees! Orangutans, gibbons, bats, sloths, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Find out the answers to some of nature’s biggest mysteries! Why do gorillas spend so much time in trees, why do male lions have such shaggy manes, why do jellyfish live upside down? You’ve got questions, and Jungle Jack has the answers!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi head deep into Rwanda's Virunga Mountains on a trek to find endangered Mountain Gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down some of the mightiest mouths in the animal kingdom, including Great White Sharks, Hyenas, Lions, Hippos, Nile Crocodiles, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Swimming with Manatees
programme.desc: Sailors once thought manatees were mythical sea creatures -- find out why on this Wild Countdown as we head to Florida, the Amazon Basin, and all the way to Singapore meeting these magical marine mammals!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Island Hopping
programme.desc: From the Florida Keys to Grand Cayman and all the way to Fiji, we’re going island hopping on today’s Wild Countdown! Most visitors hit the beaches, but ole’ Jungle Jack heads straight to the rare and unique wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: What do jackals, sharks and leopards have in common? They’re scavengers, some of the most resourceful creatures! They survive on the remains that hunters leave behind, whether it’s deep in the woods, at the bottom of the sea, or even up a tree!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for his all-time favorite animal adventures in the wild! The Great Migration, Mountain Gorillas, Elephants, Mandrills and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: At Home on the Range
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack saddles up for a farm fresh countdown! Donkeys, musk ox, camels, and all sorts of barnyard fun is in store as Jack travels to ranches and farms from North and South America to the Middle East.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: A Horse Unless of Course
programme.desc: If you thought horses were cool, just wait until you meet some of their surprising relatives! Rhinos, tapirs, donkeys, zebras and the Horse Whisperer himself!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to the awe-inspiring Galapagos Islands where he visits a pristine island booming with bio-diversity called Fernandina, home to a huge colony of Marine Iguanas, along with Sea Lions, Sally Lightfoot Crabs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: In Africa, the Lion is king! This is the only place on the planet where white lions roam free. Join Jack as he searches for Big Cats and Big Adventure in the unique arid landscape of Sanbona!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to a special animal rescue center in the jungles of Costa Rica, and encounters creatures around every corner. Caiman, Toucan, Iguanas, Howler Monkeys and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Loango National Park in Gabon is often called Africa's Last Eden. Come along with Jack and his family as they explore the untouched wilderness, encountering Forest Elephants, Forest Buffalo, an injured Sea Turtle and the wildest beach on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: How in the world do bats find their way in the dark? How do caterpillars turn into butterflies? How long can tortoises really live? The world has questions, and Jungle Jack has answers on today’s Wild Countdown!
